scripts.text:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS INVOICE_COUNT FROM [dbo].[tb_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging]
WHERE processed_bit is NULL or Processed_bit = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS LINE_COUNT FROM [dbo].[tb_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging]
WHERE processed_bit is NULL or Processed_bit = 0

text.value:
UPDATE [dbo].[tb_generic_ap_invoice_lines_staging]
    SET processed_bit = 1
    WHERE processed_bit = 0 OR processed_bit IS NULL

    UPDATE [dbo].[tb_generic_ap_invoice_header_staging]
    SET processed_bit = 1
     WHERE processed_bit = 0 OR processed_bit IS NULL
